no: Bard Song Switching (Icewind Mode) for BGEE Wants to go after modifications to vanilla bard kits. Workshop Kitpack wants to go after this though. Might want to avoid mixing with other mods changing the bard songs like those from IWDification, Bardic Wonders, Might and Guile, and Talents of Faerun.
sum: Allows bards to freely switch between different bard songs during gameplay, similar to Icewind Dale, with enhanced and lingering song abilities at high levels.

co.n: Bard Song Switching Patch for BGEE Series
Allows Image Projections to Perform Bard Songs
